title: Inference, Annotations, Literals, and Widening · Type-System Trace: Literal Widening
summary: Model service categories, thresholds, identifiers, and configuration without widening away domain meaning. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts literal widening increment in a literal-safe service configuration model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Control literal widening with const bindings, readonly context, const assertions, and const type parameters.
Add annotations at public, recursive, overloaded, and external boundaries without redundantly annotating obvious locals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
